endpoint: MCP tool scan_trade_calls — ENRICHED mode (includeReasoning:true) + Streamable-HTTP /mcp
supersedes_note: Complements (does NOT replace) scan-trade-calls-shape-snapshot-2026-06-04.json, which documents the DEFAULT (bare) shape. This snapshot documents the opt-in enriched shape returned ONLY when includeReasoning:true. Bare/default output stays byte-identical to the 2026-06-04 snapshot (+ the SCAN-RANKBY rank echo).
naming_law: Public fields use `call` / `confidence`, never `signal`. `outcome_*` is INTERNAL-only (Data Integrity LAW).

param.includeReasoning: boolean, default false. true ⇒ each NON-HOLD call is enriched at OUTPUT via enrichScanCall (HOLDs stay bare + free). Orthogonal to rankBy — composes.
param.default_false_rationale: Bare back-compat is the firewall; enrichment is opt-in on the breadth tool. (NB: get_trade_call.includeReasoning defaults TRUE; scan defaults FALSE.)

allowed_keys.factors_item_note: direction ∈ {bullish, bearish, neutral}. Byte-identical to the formatReceipts factors get_trade_call emits (single-derivation).

forbidden_keys_note: outcome_* are INTERNAL-only. The RAW engine `indicators` object is NEVER exposed — enrichScanCall projects ONLY the allow-listed `factors` + `price` + `reasoning` + `oi_change_window` (explicit copy, never a spread). Raw indicator fields (funding_24h_avg / underlying_session / funding_note) stay internal.

content_envelope.content[0]: the JSON envelope (structured _receipts block retained — same as bare mode).
content_envelope.content[1]_bare_mode: the `Proof:` receipts footer (renderScanReceiptText) — UNCHANGED in default/bare mode.
content_envelope.content[1]_enriched_mode: the digest TEXT (renderScanDigest): a 🚀 header + one renderScanDigestLine per actionable call — NO Proof footer (parity with OPS-SCANWATCH-ROCKET-NO-PROOF). The structured _receipts JSON still rides in content[0].

digest_line_format.line2_optional: 📊 {≤3 drivers joined by ' · '}  (OI driver carries its (window); arrows: bullish ↑ / bearish ↓ / neutral none)
digest_line_format.sot: src/lib/scan-digest.ts::renderScanDigestLine — MIRRORED by the bot's Python rendering (CH3); CH4 canary pins byte-identical.

cache_contract.option_A_ratified: 2026-06-28 architect ratification: the scanner's internal scorer ALWAYS computes the canonical per-coin detail (getTradeSignal includeReasoning:true, internal:true) and caches it on the (coin,exchange,timeframe) cell. Bare mode projects toScanCallItem (drops enrichment); enriched mode projects enrichScanCall. NO recompute.
cache_contract.w1_law_scope: The 'never cache' law binds ONLY the lens-VARYING rank echo (rank_value + the typed rank field) — attached at OUTPUT via attachRank, never cached. The cache-key-DETERMINED enrichment (price/factors/reasoning) is correctly cached (identical for a coin regardless of rankBy/includeReasoning).
cache_contract.property: An enriched scan THEN a bare scan of the same coin/tf leaves NO stale enrichment (bare projects bare) — pinned by tests/unit/scan-digest-mode.test.ts.

quota_contract.units_charged: max(1, non-HOLD calls in returned calls[]) — UNCHANGED. Enriching the same set adds ZERO billable units (HOLDs stay free).

consumers: MCP clients (Claude Desktop / Code / Cursor / Cline via tools/list) — includeReasoning:true
webhook scan_digest calls[] (CH2 — projects from enrichScanCall)
algovault-bot /scan + /scanwatch (CH3 — renders from the enriched scan, retires the Python re-derivation)
drift_check_command: curl -s -X POST https://api.algovault.com/mcp -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json, text/event-stream' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"scan_trade_calls","arguments":{"topN":10,"exchange":"BINANCE","timeframe":"15m","includeReasoning":true}}}' | jq -r '.result.content[0].text' | jq '(.calls[0]|keys)' && echo '--- forbidden-key scan (expect empty) ---' && curl -s -X POST https://api.algovault.com/mcp -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json, text/event-stream' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"scan_trade_calls","arguments":{"topN":10,"exchange":"BINANCE","includeReasoning":true,"includeHolds":true}}}' | grep -oE '"(outcome_return_pct|outcome_price|price_at_signal|indicators)"\s*:' || echo 'OK: no forbidden keys'
